arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Real Madrid: Kick-off time and where to watch El Clasico from USA
arts.sum: T he match that everyone has been waiting for has finally arrived, and on Sunday Barcelona and Real Madrid will fight for the title this season in LaLiga . Barcelona go into El Clasico as the leaders of the tournament with 79 points, compared to Los Blancos' 75, so a victory for the Catalans would put them seven points clear, and while a win would not officially give them the championship with nine points still to play for, everyone knows that it would mean winning the tournament virtually.

arts.sum: Barcelona can go seven points clear of Real Madrid in La Liga with three games to go if the win El Clásico on Sunday.

arts.ttl: “You have to congratulate Hansi Flick and Barcelona” – Real Madrid icon Toni Kroos
arts.sum: Barcelona will not win the Champions League this season, but their efforts in the competition have been commended by many in recent months. And the latest to give praise to the Catalan side is Real Madrid icon Toni Kroos.
